semantic.role: Core text formatting and trimming utility module for prompt construction in the ArchSpine system.
responsibilities: Trims a string to a specified maximum number of lines, appending an ellipsis if truncated.
Trims a string to a specified maximum character count while preserving whole lines up to the limit.
Splits rule data into blocks on `[Rule: ]` markers, trimming whitespace and removing empty entries.
Trims rule data by splitting into blocks and applying character-based trimming to each, rejoining non-empty results.
Trims sectioned context data by splitting on double newlines, trimming each section by character limit, and rejoining.
Compacts a FileSkeleton for prompt inclusion according to prompt budgets.
Trims a previous semantic context to a maximum number of responsibilities.
outOfScope: Direct interaction with large language model APIs
invariants: All exported functions are pure operations on string data with no side effects.
The module does not import or depend on infrastructure facades, thus conforming to the infra-facade-imports rule (which applies only to infra modules).

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide reusable, composable text trimming utilities tailored to the prompt construction pipeline, ensuring deterministic size control for rule blocks, context sections, and skeleton representations.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Expanded the utility module from basic line/char trimming to include rule-specific and skeleton-specific trimming functions, aligning with broader ArchSpine v1.0.0 architectural governance and semantic layer goals.

semantic.driftReason: Previous semantic only described two trimming functions; the current code includes five additional functions for rule block splitting, sectioned context trimming, skeleton compaction, and previous semantic trimming, significantly broadening responsibilities.

English.role: Core text formatting and trimming utility module for prompt construction in the ArchSpine system.
responsibilities: Trims a string to a specified maximum number of lines, appending an ellipsis if truncated.
Trims a string to a specified maximum character count while preserving whole lines up to the limit.
Splits rule data into blocks on `[Rule: ]` markers, trimming whitespace and removing empty entries.
Trims rule data by splitting into blocks and applying character-based trimming to each, rejoining non-empty results.
Trims sectioned context data by splitting on double newlines, trimming each section by character limit, and rejoining.
Compacts a FileSkeleton for prompt inclusion according to prompt budgets.
Trims a previous semantic context to a maximum number of responsibilities.
outOfScope: Direct interaction with large language model APIs

Simplified Chinese.role: 用于ArchSpine系统提示构建的核心文本格式化和裁剪工具模块。
responsibilities: 将字符串裁剪到指定最大行数，若超限则追加省略号。
将字符串裁剪到指定最大字符数，同时尽量保持完整行边界。
按`[Rule: ]`标记将规则数据拆分为多个块，并去除空白和空条目。
将规则数据拆分为块后，对每个块应用基于字符的裁剪，重新合并非空结果。
将分段上下文数据按双换行拆分，对每段按字符限制裁剪后重新合并。
根据提示预算压缩FileSkeleton以纳入提示。
将先前语义上下文裁剪到指定的最大职责数量。
outOfScope: 直接与大型语言模型API交互

exports.name: trimPreviousSemantic
exports.signature:
trimPreviousSemantic(
  previousSemantic: PreviousSemanticContext | undefined,
  maxResponsibilities: number,
)
